name: geomcp
description: MCP server to parse geometry problems and draw precise diagrams

scripts.test:capture: env -u GEOMCP_OPENAI_API_KEY -u OPENAI_API_KEY GEOMCP_OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1 GEOMCP_OPENAI_MODEL=geomcp-qwen tsx tests/capture-llm.mts
scripts.mcp:local: pgrep -x ollama >/dev/null || (ollama serve &>/tmp/ollama.log & sleep 2); env -u GEOMCP_OPENAI_API_KEY -u OPENAI_API_KEY GEOMCP_OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1 GEOMCP_OPENAI_MODEL=geomcp-qwen tsx src/index.ts
scripts.web:local: pkill -f 'tsx src/webapp' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; pgrep -x ollama >/dev/null || (ollama serve &>/tmp/ollama.log & sleep 2); env -u GEOMCP_OPENAI_API_KEY -u OPENAI_API_KEY GEOMCP_OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1 GEOMCP_OPENAI_MODEL=geomcp-qwen tsx src/webapp.ts
scripts.web:local:debug: pkill -f 'tsx src/webapp' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; pgrep -x ollama >/dev/null || (ollama serve &>/tmp/ollama.log & sleep 2); env -u GEOMCP_OPENAI_API_KEY -u OPENAI_API_KEY GEOMCP_OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1 GEOMCP_OPENAI_MODEL=geomcp-qwen NODE_OPTIONS='--inspect --enable-source-maps' tsx src/webapp.ts
